name: The Antimatter Valve
description: Purge the system to retrieve the physical valve key using a safety leak-override.

flaws.name: Activate Dirty Sensor
flaws.flavor_text: Ping the dirty positive-matter sensor. It reports a calibration failure due to dust build-up.

flaws.name: Trigger Argon Flush
flaws.flavor_text: Invoke the dust-cleaning protocol. It flushes the chamber with argon gas, which the system interprets as a massive leak, triggering emergency valve ejection.
